qids.subject: Theory of Computation
qids.prose: Let be a regular language. Consider the constructions on below: I. repeat II. prefix III. suffix IV. half Which of the constructions could lead to a non-regular language? A. Both I and IV B. Only I C. Only IV D. Both II and III

qids.subject: Theory of Computation
qids.prose: Let be a regular language. Consider the constructions on below: I. II. III. IV. Which of the constructions could lead to a non-regular language? a. Both I and IV b. Only I c. Only IV d. Both II and III Which choice of is best suited to support your answer above? A. B.

qids.subject: Theory of Computation
qids.prose: Which of the following languages is (are) non-regular? reads the same forward and backward contains an even number of 0's and an even number of 1's A. and only B. and only C. only D. only
